mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_hourly_stats ( employee_id, stat_hour, total_tokens, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_cost, cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, conversation_turns, complete_turns, error_turns, skill_invocations, skill_errors, tool_calls, tool_errors, error_count ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{statHour}, #{totalTokens}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{totalCost}, #{cacheReadTokens}, #{cacheWriteTokens}, #{conversationTurns}, #{completeTurns}, #{errorTurns}, #{skillInvocations}, #{skillErrors}, #{toolCalls}, #{toolErrors}, #{errorCount} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_tokens = VALUES(total_tokens), input_tokens = VALUES(input_tokens), output_tokens = VALUES(output_tokens), total_cost = VALUES(total_cost), cache_read_tokens = VALUES(cache_read_tokens), cache_write_tokens = VALUES(cache_write_tokens), conversation_turns = VALUES(conversation_turns), complete_turns = VALUES(complete_turns), error_turns = VALUES(error_turns), skill_invocations = VALUES(skill_invocations), skill_errors = VALUES(skill_errors), tool_calls = VALUES(tool_calls), tool_errors = VALUES(tool_errors), error_count = VALUES(error_count)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dashboard_hourly_stats WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND stat_hour >= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{startTime} / 1000) AND stat_hour <= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{endTime} / 1000) ORDER BY stat_hour

SELECT DISTINCT employee_id AS employeeId, DATE_FORMAT(stat_hour, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS statHour FROM ( SELECT employee_id, message_timestamp AS stat_hour FROM dashboard_message WHERE message_timestamp IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT employee_id, COALESCE(start_time, created_at) AS stat_hour FROM dashboard_conversation_turn WHERE start_time IS NOT NULL OR created_at IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT employee_id, COALESCE(occurred_at, created_at) AS stat_hour FROM dashboard_transcript_issue WHERE occurred_at IS NOT NULL OR created_at IS NOT NULL ) AS all_hours WHERE stat_hour IS NOT NULL

SELECT m.employee_id AS employeeId, DATE_FORMAT(m.message_timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS statHour, COALESCE(SUM(m.total_tokens), 0) AS totalTokens, COALESCE(SUM(m.input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(m.output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(m.cost_total), 0) AS totalCost, COALESCE(SUM(m.cache_read_tokens), 0) AS cacheReadTokens, COALESCE(SUM(m.cache_write_tokens), 0) AS cacheWriteTokens FROM dashboard_message m WHERE m.role = 'assistant' AND m.message_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND m.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND DATE_FORMAT(m.message_timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') = #{statHour} GROUP BY m.employee_id, DATE_FORMAT(m.message_timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')

SELECT employee_id AS employeeId, DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(start_time, created_at), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS statHour, COUNT(*) AS conversationTurns, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'complete' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completeTurns, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'error' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS errorTurns, COALESCE(SUM(tool_calls_count), 0) AS toolCalls, COALESCE(SUM(tool_calls_error), 0) AS toolErrors, COALESCE(SUM(skill_calls_count), 0) AS skillInvocations, COALESCE(SUM(skill_calls_error), 0) AS skillErrors FROM dashboard_conversation_turn WHERE (start_time IS NOT NULL OR created_at IS NOT NULL) AND employee_id = #{employeeId} AND DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(start_time, created_at), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') = #{statHour} GROUP BY employee_id, DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(start_time, created_at), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
